code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = ""
mut count = 0
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  let b = match bopt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 12 or b == 11
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let token = string.substring(input, start, i)
      let key = "\u{0001}#{token}\u{0001}"
      if not string.contains(seen, key)
        seen = "#{seen}#{key}"
        count = count + 1
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let token = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let key = "\u{0001}#{token}\u{0001}"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
